title: Query.exe
html:
Query.exe

Remote Desktop Services MultiUser Query Utility

Execute

Execute an arbitrary executable via trusted system executable.

query.exe user

Once executed, `query.exe` will execute `quser.exe` in the same folder. Thus, if `query.exe` is copied to a folder and an arbitrary executable is renamed to `quser.exe`, `query.exe` will spawn it. Instead of `user`, it is also possible to use `session`, `termsession` or `process` as command-line option. — MITRE: T1218 — Privileges: User
